name: fc-lang
description: Syntax highlighting, diagnostics, hover, completion and type CodeLens for the FC language, powered by `fcc --lsp`.

fc.serverPath.description: Path to the fcc binary used as the language server (invoked with --lsp).

fc.stdlibPath.description: Directory containing the FC stdlib .fc files (sets FCC_STDLIB_DIR for the server). Leave empty to use the installed location.

enumDescriptions: Show each binding's inferred type inline, after the name (let x: i32) (default).
Show each binding's inferred type as a CodeLens on the line above.
fc.typeDisplay.description: How to display the inferred type of each `let` binding.
